mapper.select: /* 알림 설정: 내 설정 조회 */ SELECT USR_NTF_STG_SN AS usrNtfStgSn, USR_SN AS usrSn, USR_NTF_STG_AUC_INAPP_YN AS usrNtfStgAucInappYn, USR_NTF_STG_AUC_EMAIL_YN AS usrNtfStgAucEmailYn, USR_NTF_STG_TRD_INAPP_YN AS usrNtfStgTrdInappYn, USR_NTF_STG_TRD_EMAIL_YN AS usrNtfStgTrdEmailYn, USR_NTF_STG_SVC_INAPP_YN AS usrNtfStgSvcInappYn, USR_NTF_STG_SVC_EMAIL_YN AS usrNtfStgSvcEmailYn, USR_NTF_STG_REG_DT AS usrNtfStgRegDt, USR_NTF_STG_UPDT_DT AS usrNtfStgUpdtDt FROM USER_NOTIFICATION_SETTING WHERE USR_SN = #{usrSn}
mapper.insert: /* 알림 설정: 저장 (없으면 생성, 있으면 갱신) */ INSERT INTO USER_NOTIFICATION_SETTING (USR_SN, USR_NTF_STG_AUC_INAPP_YN, USR_NTF_STG_AUC_EMAIL_YN, USR_NTF_STG_TRD_INAPP_YN, USR_NTF_STG_TRD_EMAIL_YN, USR_NTF_STG_SVC_INAPP_YN, USR_NTF_STG_SVC_EMAIL_YN) VALUES (#{usrSn}, #{usrNtfStgAucInappYn}, #{usrNtfStgAucEmailYn}, #{usrNtfStgTrdInappYn}, #{usrNtfStgTrdEmailYn}, #{usrNtfStgSvcInappYn}, #{usrNtfStgSvcEmailYn}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE USR_NTF_STG_AUC_INAPP_YN = #{usrNtfStgAucInappYn}, USR_NTF_STG_AUC_EMAIL_YN = #{usrNtfStgAucEmailYn}, USR_NTF_STG_TRD_INAPP_YN = #{usrNtfStgTrdInappYn}, USR_NTF_STG_TRD_EMAIL_YN = #{usrNtfStgTrdEmailYn}, USR_NTF_STG_SVC_INAPP_YN = #{usrNtfStgSvcInappYn}, USR_NTF_STG_SVC_EMAIL_YN = #{usrNtfStgSvcEmailYn}
